title: ilex purpurea var. oldhamii
intro: Ilex purpurea var. oldhamii, also known as Chinese holly or Oldham's holly, is a plant species within the holly family, characterized by its glossy leaves and red berries. Traditionally, Ilex purpurea var. oldhamii has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. Ilex purpurea var. oldhamii is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and may also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its medicinal properties.
